title: DaySpot
description: DaySpot shows time, coords, biome, weather, FPS, and more in a clean HUD. It also alerts you to hostile mobs outside your view with smart proximity warnings. Fully customizable, simple, and built to keep you informed and alive.
body:
# DaySpot

A lightweight HUD overlay mod that displays day count, time, biome, moon phase, coordinates, weather, and FPS on screen, with a danger alert system that warns you when hostile mobs are nearby outside your field of view.

---

## Features

- **6 Configurable Positions** — Top Center (default), Top Left, Top Right, Bottom Left, Bottom Right, Above Hotbar
- **Per-line Toggle & Color** — Enable/disable each info line independently with 11 color choices
- **24h/12h Time Format** — Toggle between 24-hour and 12-hour (AM/PM) time display
- **HUD Scale** — Adjustable from 0.5x to 1.5x
- **Danger Alert System** — 3-tier proximity alerts (Awareness/Warning/Danger) with per-mob detection ranges
- **Per-Mob Configuration** — Enable/disable alerts for Creeper, Zombie, Skeleton, Enderman, Witch, Spider, and Wither Skeleton individually
- **3 Alert Styles** — Serious (mob + direction), Humorous (randomized messages), Minimal (mob name only)
- **Direction Indicators** — Alerts tell you which direction the threat is coming from

![HUD MOB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8e16ee05482e630420581017544b3297c2e2b53.gif)


---

## Requirements

- Minecraft: 1.20.1 / 1.21.1
- Loader: Forge / NeoForge / Fabric
- Cloth Config (Forge/NeoForge): 11.x+ / 15.x+
- YACL (Fabric): 3.6.x+

---

## Installation

1. Install the appropriate mod loader for your Minecraft version
2. Download DaySpot from this page
3. Place the `.jar` file in your `.minecraft/mods/` folder
4. Launch Minecraft and configure via the Mods menu

---

## Configuration

Access the config screen via the Mods menu → DaySpot → Config. All settings are client-side and require no server installation.

**Display tab**: HUD position, scale, alignment, toggle and color each info line
**Danger Alerts tab**: Enable/disable alerts, alert cooldown, message style, per-mob detection range with mob selector

---

## Compatibility

- Tested on Forge 1.20.1, Forge 1.21.1, NeoForge 1.21.1, Fabric 1.20.1, Fabric 1.21.1
- Client-side only — works on any server without installation
- Modpack inclusion: Allowed under MIT license

---

## FAQ

**Q: Can I include this in a modpack?**
A: Yes! DaySpot is licensed under MIT. Feel free to include it in any modpack.

**Q: Does this work on servers?**
A: DaySpot is client-side only. Install it on your client — no server installation needed.

**Have ideas, questions, or feedback?** Feel free to visit the official page of [Arvani Creations](https://arvani-creations.netlify.app/) for more information and updates.

---
